insights: Facsimile signatures account for 33% (2/6) of rejections; confirmed good uses authentic Topps Tribute.
Title-card mismatch present in 17% (1/6) of rejections; confirmed listing has matching set/card info.
Modern unlicensed sets (Panini Donruss 2024) rejected; confirmed uses established 2023 Topps product.
Novelty/print designations and gold edition parallels are red flags absent from confirmed listing.
Wrong card number and wrong set issues appear in 33% (2/6) of rejections.
Confirmed snipe has 82% delta (market $90, listed $16); all rejections lack valid pricing context.
High emoji density in rejected titles (fire, rocket, star emojis) vs. clean formatting in confirmed.
Confirmed listing uses standard set notation (2023 Topps Tribute, /99, Card 77) with clear player-year-set alignment.
